{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Silverlord invasion
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Silverlord invasion]] caused damage to the destiny of the world.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
